data.raw: Add a dark mode toggle to settings
reconstructed_ac: settings page must offer a dark mode toggle
when toggled the theme must update without reload
assumptions: implementation lives in the settings UI module
no behaviour change to non-theme settings

stack_data=2: prompt is behavioural, no stack/data signal
reversibility=2: code-only change, cheap to revert

when toggled the theme must update without reload
